nasb.text: What the eyes see is better than what the soul desires. This too is futility and a striving after wind.

esv.text: Better is the sight of the eyes than the wandering of the appetite: this also is vanity and a striving after wind.

cnv.text: 眼睛看見的，勝過心中想望的。這也是虛空，也是捕風。

ccb.text: 满足于眼前所有的，胜过心中贪想的。这也是虚空，如同捕风。

csbs.text: 眼睛所见的好过心里妄想。这也是虚空，也是捕风！
